message:
fix(audit): handle Close error and add Sync in LogDetachAudit

Check f.Close() error via named return instead of ignoring it, and add
f.Sync() after f.Write() to ensure audit entries are flushed to disk
before closing. Prevents silent audit data loss on crash.

Fixes: gt-mvhssj.8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
